is.one_liner: Sealed registry of chat-medium presentation capabilities — what can THIS chat medium render?
scope: Answer 'what can this chat medium render?' as a sealed Effect Schema registry
Sit at the L2 boundary between L1 character config and L3 cmp-boundary transforms
Model MediumCapability as a discriminated union (Discord webhook + interaction, CLI, Telegram)

is_not: Does NOT implement any chat medium — it declares capabilities, not renderers
Will NOT be a Discord bot or a chat client
Does NOT transform output — that is the L3 cmp-boundary
_comment: Published as @0xhoneyjar/medium-registry (v0.2 live). composes_with + acvp_invariants + capabilities omitted pending port-schema sealing (ADR-007 App A.2 / ADR-008 §D-11). Consumed by freeside-characters, activities-api, loa-finn (see README).
